prompt.content: What is 47 multiplied by 83? Give only the final integer.
Compute 234 plus 567 minus 98. Give only the final integer.
A train travels 63 km per hour for 7 hours. How many km does it travel? Give only the final integer.
What is 96 divided by 4, then multiplied by 5? Give only the final integer.
There are 18 boxes with 24 items each. How many items in total? Give only the final integer.
What is 15 squared minus 100? Give only the final integer.
What is the area of a rectangle that is 23 cm by 17 cm, in square cm? Give only the final integer.
What is 1000 minus 7 times 13? Give only the final integer.
What is the sum of all integers from 1 to 20? Give only the final integer.
What is 19 multiplied by 21? Give only the final integer.
